MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-13-2024 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2023 Continued To Jul-12-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action
Off Calendar May-26-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Armando Lopez, Esq. 3110-552-2250 Knight Law Group for Plaintiff.
Greg Gruzman, Esq. 415-875-3339 Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani for Defendant FORD MOTOR COMPANY.

RULING - A R G U E D. Mr. Gruzman argues sales contract and warranties. The Court inquires on equitable estoppel. Mr. Lopez responds to Mr. Gruzman's argument. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action.

Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CK)

RULING - A R G U E D. Mr. Gruzman argues sales contract and warranties. The Court inquires on equitable estoppel. Mr. Lopez responds to Mr. Gruzman's argument. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Off Calendar May-12-2023 Continued To May-26-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action

No appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action is continued to May 26, 2023.

Plaintiff is to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of all papers to dept. 302 no later than May 16, 2023 at 9:30 a.m. with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/JMQ)
